title: Fix white screen crash in shopping cart system

requirements.text: Debug and fix the runtime error causing a white screen on load. Audit App.tsx, CartContext.tsx, CartPanel.tsx, CheckoutModal.tsx, and CartIcon.tsx for any JavaScript/TypeScript errors such as: missing or incorrect CartProvider wrapping in the component tree, context being consumed outside its provider, invalid destructuring of context values, missing default values in CartContext, import/export mismatches, or any unhandled exceptions during initial render. Ensure CartProvider wraps all components that consume CartContext in App.tsx or main.tsx (without modifying main.tsx or other immutable files). Add a fallback default context value so the app does not crash if context is accessed before the provider mounts.

quotes: it is showing white screen only

acceptanceCriteria: The page renders without a white screen on initial load
No unhandled JavaScript errors appear in the browser console on startup
CartContext is correctly provided to all components that consume it
All cart features (cart icon, CartPanel, CheckoutModal, Add to Cart buttons) function correctly after the fix
The app loads correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (immutable path)
Preserve all existing cart functionality: localStorage persistence, quantity controls, WhatsApp order submission, checkout form
nonGoals: Adding new features to the cart or checkout flow
Changing the WhatsApp order flow or message format
